title: medicago falcata var. annularis
intro: Medicago falcata var. annularis, also known as Annular Medic or Goat's Horn Clover, is a perennial plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Medicago falcata var. annularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
